_publications._publicationTitle: HuR/ELAVL1 drives malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor growth and metastasis.

_contextSnippet: There were similar numbers of significantly upregulated and downregulated transcripts exhibiting more than 2-fold changes (1563 and 1627, respectively)
details: 1563 significantly upregulated and 1627 significantly downregulated transcripts with more than 2-fold changes after HuR silencing
